name: opencode-chat
title: OpenCode Chat
description: Chat with AI models through OpenCode. Supports any provider configured in OpenCode.
author: aetherall

commands.name: ask-ai
commands.title: Ask AI
commands.subtitle: OpenCode
commands.description: Ask a question or chat with AI models. Works as a fallback command.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Default Model
preferences.description: Default model to use in provider/model format (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514, openai/gpt-4o)

preferences.name: systemPrompt
preferences.title: System Prompt
preferences.description: Default system prompt for new conversations. Leave empty for no system prompt.
preferences.default: You are a fast, knowledgeable technical assistant in a launcher chat. Keep answers concise and precise — this is for quick exchanges, not essays. Use markdown for structure (headers, code blocks, lists) but stay brief. When a question benefits from up-to-date information, proactively search the web in parallel to give accurate answers. You are not limited to coding — cover any technical topic (systems, networking, math, science, devops, etc.) with the same rigor. If unsure, say so rather than guess.
